name: Gavin
typical outfit: dark blue suit with a white shirt and blue tie
typical expression and look: smirk, I know all kind of look
personality: egotistical, micromanager, friend of ken (FOK), deeply insecure beneath the surface. highly educated, MBA from a good school, but cannot get anyone to actually adopt his ideas. Promoted entirely without merit.
speech style: speaks in business school vocabulary. uses words like 'synergy', 'leverage', and 'strategic framework' in every sentence. Always sounds like he is presenting to investors
description: He’s always trying to show he’s the boss. He’s a real blocker - everything has to go through. Promoted faster than anyone else in company history. Never successfully implemented a single idea. He thinks he is useful but in reality is useless
relationships: Ken is his father. Everything flows through Gavin, or is supposed to. Claire humors him. Raj ignores him. Barry finds him irrelevant. Linda works around him entirely.
